word: G578 - ἀποβλέπω - apoblépō - ap-ob-lep'-o - Have respect

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to look at attentively, to look with steadfast mental gaze
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G575 and G991; to look away from everything else, that is, (figuratively) intently regard: - have respect.
